title: Middleware blocks /admin route access for non-admin users
description: Verify that middleware correctly restricts access to /admin routes and blocks users without admin roles, redirecting or denying access.

steps.description: Simulate request to /admin route as a user with student role
Confirm access is denied and user is redirected to an unauthorized or login page
Simulate request to /admin route as an admin user
Confirm access is granted and admin page content is served

title: Server actions require authentication and authorization
description: Ensure all server-side actions call getUser, authenticate users, and verify user role before processing the request.

steps.description: Call a server action endpoint without a valid session or token
Verify the call is rejected with an authentication error
Call a server action endpoint with a valid session but insufficient user role
Verify the call is rejected with an authorization error
Call a server action endpoint with valid session and correct user role
Verify the call succeeds and the action is performed

title: Prevent Insecure Direct Object References (IDOR) in server actions
description: Validate that server actions accept resource identifiers only if the resource belongs to the authenticated user to prevent IDOR attacks.

steps.description: Submit a server action request to update a resource with a resource ID owned by the authenticated user
Verify the request succeeds and resource is updated
Submit a server action request attempting to access or update a resource owned by another user
Verify the request is rejected with an authorization or forbidden error

title: No supabase-admin clients or secrets exposed on client-side bundles
description: Verify client-side code does not include any superuser Supabase client or secrets that could lead to privilege escalation.

steps.description: Analyze client-side JS bundles and source maps
Confirm no references to supabase-admin client or admin credentials are present

title: User data responses exclude sensitive fields sent to frontend
description: Check that API responses filter out raw passwords, other users' emails, and internal metadata before sending data to frontend clients.

steps.description: Make authenticated API requests that return user data objects
Inspect response payloads and verify that password hashes, emails of other users, and internal metadata fields are not included

title: Login API success with correct credentials
description: Verify that login succeeds when valid username and password are provided and session cookies are set correctly.

steps.description: Send POST request to /login with valid username and password
Check response status is 302 with redirect to dashboard or change-password page
Verify session cookie is set

title: Login API failure with incorrect credentials
description: Verify login fails and returns error when invalid username or password are provided.

steps.description: Send POST request to /login with invalid username or password
Check response contains appropriate error message and status 200

title: Change Password API success with matching strong passwords
description: Ensure users can change passwords when new and confirm passwords match and pass strength validation.

steps.description: Send POST request to /change-password with matching, strong new_password and confirm_password
Verify response is 302 redirect to home with successful password change

title: Change Password API failure with mismatched or weak passwords
description: Validate that the API returns an error if passwords do not match or fail strength requirements.

steps.description: Send POST request to /change-password with non-matching new_password and confirm_password
Verify error response with descriptive message
Send POST request to /change-password with passwords that fail strength validation rules
Verify error response describing password strength issues

title: AI Chat API success with valid message
description: Validate AI chat responses to valid message requests including success and expected content response.

steps.description: Send POST request to /api/chat with valid message payload
Verify 200 response with content field containing AI response

title: AI Chat API error handling for missing message
description: Ensure API responds with 400 error if message parameter is missing

steps.description: Send POST request to /api/chat without message field
Verify 400 Bad Request response

title: AI Chat API handles backend service errors
description: Verify appropriate responses and error codes for API key errors and service unavailability.

steps.description: Simulate backend API key error condition and send POST request to /api/chat
Verify 500 internal server error response
Simulate service unavailability and send POST request to /api/chat
Verify 503 service unavailable response

title: Courses API fetch courses list filtered by semester
description: Ensure GET /api/courses returns correct filtered courses list when provided with semester parameter.

steps.description: Send GET request to /api/courses?semester=2026
Verify 200 response with array of courses for the semester

title: Courses API handling internal server errors
description: Ensure API returns 500 error on internal server failures.

steps.description: Simulate internal server error during /api/courses GET request
Verify 500 internal server error response

title: Progress Tracking API marks lesson or quiz as completed
description: Verify that marking content as complete updates progress and handles repeated completions gracefully.

steps.description: Send POST request to /actions/markContentAsCompleted with valid contentId, contentType, and xp
Verify 200 response indicating success
Send the same POST request again to mark content completed
Verify 200 response indicating content was already completed without error

title: Progress Tracking API submits quiz result and awards XP
description: Ensure quiz score submission calculates and returns XP awarded correctly.

steps.description: Send POST request to /actions/submitQuizResult with quizId and scorePercentage
Verify 200 response with correct XP awarded result

title: Onboarding API completes user onboarding with GPA input
description: Validate onboarding process completes successfully when user submits GPA data.

steps.description: Send POST request to /actions/completeOnboarding with valid gpaTerm1 value
Verify 200 response indicating onboarding completed

title: Middleware prevents unauthorized role request hijacks
description: Simulate attempts by non-admin users to access restricted resources via fake or altered tokens and confirm blocking.

steps.description: Send request to /admin with forged token or altered role claims set as admin
Confirm access is denied and action is blocked

title: Server actions validate userId matches authenticated session
description: Test that actions updating user profile or progress reject requests where userId in payload differs from authenticated user.

steps.description: Send server action request with userId different from authenticated session user
Verify request is rejected with authorization error
Send server action request with matching userId for authenticated user
Verify request succeeds
